陈青玄——
我穿越了。
但穿越在世界毁灭重塑前，鸭梨山大！
所幸获得<天龙人>白嫖系统。
只要找到那些未来的大佬，趁她们成长起来前签下卖身契，她们的修炼成果就将被我获取。
桀桀桀~提前穿越可真香！
凰倾雪——
我从小孤苦伶仃，还在幼年时被一个<邪修>留下心理阴影。
我发誓要找到他，踩死他！
可还没等我成为一代女帝，发现身体卡在了萝莉。
邪修给我吃了什么？
姜素素——
我自幼孤苦无依，直至遇到一个男人。
是他让我看到了希望。
可当我沉浸在，长大之后嫁给他时.....他把我卖了。
呜呜，我要变病娇....坐死负心汉！
姬千幽——
师尊好帅，师尊好温柔！
可他说不想找道侣。
直到一天.....我发现他跟我娘亲在一起了。
....
多年后。
神凰女帝、西域妖姬、东土玄女....没有出现。
多了三个实力恐怖，却又卡在萝莉时期的人材。
白毛女帝：那个.....青玄能做我宝宝么？我想补偿你！
玄女妹妹：哥哥，我帮你给倾雪下情粉，你饶了我吧！
妖皇爱徒：师尊，你看我像不像娘亲？
陈青玄两手一摊——
“善缘，都是善缘啊！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/70e095c3e19a9edc682a2c3c1bc6e2ce","author":"青灯语","author_id":"","book_id":"7530127186355833880","book_name":"开局胁迫雌小鬼，契约白毛小女帝","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#283848","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":378,"name":"女帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=378&name=女帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7532254577219863102","read_count":"15818","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"568759"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.9","serial_count":"221","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,女帝,大佬","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c8325d860991008f714315e76ad53d35~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779255301&x-signature=A0U9PrnTsczqJLw9hAcyRhBplbc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4270110833921048","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"34"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211335016AE628B2416445BA9583"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":12883
